description: Notebook 2 frozen node-type + gene-identity resolution for the 183 pending_db_resolution base symbols from the Raghunath network. Deterministic input consumed by 02_resolve_network_to_genes.ipynb.
cascade: 1. exact case-sensitive official HGNC symbol (MyGene symbol scope) & protein-coding -> protein
2. documented alias->single official protein-coding symbol -> protein (mygene symbol,alias scope)
3. gene-family / enzyme-class node -> protein_family (representative member recorded)

5. small_molecule/peptide identity resolved by DATABASE SYNONYM LOOKUP: the raw network abbreviation (underscores mechanically removed only) is sent to the PubChem name/synonym index; a hit is accepted ONLY when it is unambiguous (n_cids_total==1). 19/27 resolved this way. The 8 that no synonym search resolves unambiguously (or that return a chemically wrong entity, e.g. Singlet_oxygen->'oxidane') are flagged 'manual_ruling_documented' with a ruling_rationale recorded per node in node_resolution.csv and chem_resolution_evidence.csv. No hand-authored abbreviation->name dictionary is used for typing.
trap_guard: MyGene matches symbols case-insensitively; cAMP collides with official gene CAMP (entrez 820). Exact protein type requires a CASE-EXACT symbol match, so cAMP is rejected as protein and resolved to ChEBI:17489 (3',5'-cyclic AMP) instead.
uniprot_authority: All 139 distinct protein symbols map to a reviewed Swiss-Prot accession whose gene_names contains the HGNC symbol (0 flagged).
coordinate_assembly: GRCh38 (MyGene genomic_pos, default assembly; genomic_pos_hg38 field not populated by the API in this response).
darcy_kiel_crosscheck: NOT run — D'Arcy/Kiel (2023) gene tables are not staged in the repo; recorded as unavailable. MyGene+UniProt are the identity authority. Optional independent confirmation to fold in if the tables are later pinned.
residual_note: Node type is a reconstruction (not stored in the published files). Resolved node-level totals (protein-bucket 184, small_molecule 31, complex 24, process 20, environmental 2, peptide_ligand 4) differ modestly from the paper's counts; residuals are reported with per-node evidence, not forced to match.
ensembl_backfill_note: Ensembl gene IDs re-extracted list-aware from the same frozen MyGene response (handoff/mygene_raw.json); records returning ensembl as a list had been missed by the initial dict-only parse. PRSS1 (Trypsin family rep) has no Ensembl gene in its MyGene record.

small_molecule_resolution.method: PubChem name/synonym index queried with the raw network token; unambiguous (n==1) hits accepted, formula cross-checked against prior ChEBI evidence.
small_molecule_resolution.manual_ruling_reasons: compartment-tagged token (Calcium_cyt); collapsed pathway-intermediate token not DB-indexed (Cysteinyl_DOPA, Glutathionyl_DOPA, Indole_5_6_quinone, Indole_5_6_quinone_carboxylic_acid); ambiguous acronym with no compound hit (DAG); explicit compound class (ROS); DB returned wrong entity (Singlet_oxygen). Each rationale stored per-node.

revision_note: Small-molecule/peptide typing re-derived by database synonym lookup on the raw network abbreviations, replacing the earlier hand-authored abbreviation->name dictionary. The abbreviation->entity decision is now the database's for 19/27 nodes; the remaining 8 are explicit, individually-justified rulings, not a silent list.
